title: Whole protein extraction from tissues
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aoivo","text":"This protocol is for whole protein extraction from tissues like kidney, liver ,musscle etc. Histone proteins which are tightly twisted on genomic DNA can also be extracted with this protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pre-cool lysis buffer on ice. Add protease inhibitors just before using.
Add 10 fold lysis buffer to tissues (1ml lysis buffer / 100mg tissue) RIPA lysis buffer (strong) recipe
Homogenize tissues with dispenser ( working time 10s / rest time 20s, repeat 5 times) until no visible tissue blocks.
Mix samples on a rotating mixer at 4 °C for 2h.
creator: Vivian Liu
